page: Google Cloud Platform ct5l-hightpu-1t is a specialized accelerator instance featuring 24 dedicated vCPUs based on the x86_64 architecture and 48 GB of system memory. The system memory allocation provides 2.0 GB of RAM per core. The primary hardware feature is the integration of a single Google TPU, designated as the ct5l model, which acts as a dedicated hardware accelerator.

This server configuration does not include local storage, requiring external network-attached storage solutions for data persistence. It also lacks complimentary public IPv4 addresses, meaning external connectivity must be managed through separate network configurations. The RAM-to-vCPU ratio of 2:1 represents a compute-heavy design with relatively low memory density per core, which may limit memory-intensive operations.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the hardware profile is tailored for workloads that offload mathematical computations directly to the integrated TPU, maximizing the utilization of the accelerator while maintaining a moderate host memory footprint. This makes the instance appropriate for machine learning model training, deep learning inference, and other specialized tensor-based computational workloads that do not require large host memory capacities or local scratch disks.
description: Google Cloud Platform ct5l-hightpu-1t is an accelerator-optimized server featuring 24 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs, 48 GB of system memory, and a single integrated Google TPU. With a memory-to-vCPU ratio of 2.0 GB per core, this instance is designed for compute-heavy workloads that offload processing to the hardware accelerator. The server does not include local storage or complimentary public IPv4 addresses, requiring external storage and networking configurations. The qualitative cost efficiency of this instance is centered on its specialized TPU hardware, which allows for accelerated tensor computations without the overhead of massive host memory. It is designed for machine learning inference, model training, and tensor-based mathematical workloads.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform ct5l-hightpu-1t is an accelerator-optimized server with 24 dedicated vCPUs, 48 GB RAM, and one integrated Google TPU, designed for machine learning workloads.

tagline: An accelerator-optimized instance featuring dedicated vCPUs and an integrated TPU for specialized machine learning and tensor computation workloads.

Provides a compute-focused memory allocation of 2.0 GB per core
